generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PhysicalSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed commands to motor voltage for real-time speed control on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance SteeringServoController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Steering servo adjusting vehicle steering angle for navigation, controlled via ROS2 topics on Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance LowerLevelChassisController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis handling real-time speed and steering control for safety-critical operations"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing 3D point cloud data for object detection in vehicle-local frame"
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera supporting 3D perception via stereo vision"
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed measurement from physical speed controller for ego vehicle state tracking"
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurement from physical steering servo for navigation tracking"
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction - Data Transmitted
instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state data including speed and steering angle serialized via ROS2 topics"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
    base:desc "Processed object tracks generated via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering from LiDAR and camera data"
]

instance EnvironmentContextData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
    base:desc "Projected driving path derived from sensor fusion for environmental context"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model processing raw LiDAR point clouds into object clusters for initial detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter model maintaining object track states across sensor frames for accurate tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DetectedObjectTracksData
]

instance ISO15622ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Performance-class I ACC implementation (ISO 15622) for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DetectedObjectTracksData, EgoVehicleStateData
]

instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX sensor in vehicle-local coordinates"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringModel
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks resulting from DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter processing of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DetectedObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataDB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical ego vehicle state data stored in PostgreSQL database for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
]

instance ObjectTrackDataDB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object track data stored in PostgreSQL database for development analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracksData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware facilitating inter-component communication between vehicle, cloud, and UI entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables EgoVehicleStateData, DetectedObjectTracksData, EnvironmentContextData
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hosting on-board processing for sensor fusion and actuation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, LowerLevelChassisController, SteeringServoController, PhysicalSpeedController
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK enabling hardware abstraction and real-time execution on Jetson devices"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware, HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
]

instance Python38Environment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment for rapid prototyping of sensor processing and data translation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for sensor fusion algorithms and model validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables KalmanFilterTrackingModel, ISO15622ACCModel
]

instance PostgreSQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL database for storing time-series data of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables EgoVehicleStateDataDB, ObjectTrackDataDB
]

instance CloudInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote cloud servers for computation offloading and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ISO15622ACCModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, detected object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Off-board execution of ACC control logic to reduce on-board ECU load via cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteACCControl
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User-controlled commands for enabling/disabling ACC, setting speed, and emergency braking via Control Panel FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides UserControlAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-readable time-series reports of vehicle state and object tracks for development analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides DevelopmentReportInsight
]

instance SimulationExperimentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical experimentation for ACC validation through simulated scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides ExperimentalValidationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state and detected objects for operator monitoring"
]

instance RemoteACCControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Cloud-based ACC control logic execution for adaptive cruise control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UserControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-triggered commands for ACC management (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DevelopmentReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series data reports for developers to analyze ACC performance and troubleshoot issues"
]

instance ExperimentalValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Simulation-based testing of ACC edge cases during development phase"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Entity-Based Architecture
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin hosting sensor processing (LiDAR clustering, tracking), data preprocessing, and actuation components on Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, LowerLevelChassisController, SteeringServoController, PhysicalSpeedController
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin managing data collection, reporting, and ACC control logic via cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment ISO15622ACCModel, CloudInfrastructure
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User interface providing 3D visualization and control panel for remote management"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment RealTimeVisualizationService, RemoteManagementService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands to the physical twin via Wi-Fi network (UDP-based) to the ROS2 nodes on the vehicle, including: (1) **Remote ACC management**: enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking (via ROS2 topics), (2) **Actuation commands**: desired speed (converted to motor voltage by the **Actuation FE**), and (3) **Data offloading**: ACC control logic (ACC Determining FE) computes following speed based on lead vehicle distance and sends it to the vehicle for actuation. The system adheres to ISO 15622 ACC standards for performance class I."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates at real-time scales with:
  - **Perception cycle frequency**: Object tracks are updated every perception cycle (implied frequency ~10–30 Hz for LiDAR-based tracking).
  - **Latency constraint**: End-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity ≤100 ms (3GPP V2V communication requirement).
  - **Clock synchronization**: All components must share a time reference with ≤100 ms accuracy for event ordering and data integrity."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **multi-layered entity-based system** following ISO 23247, with the following orchestration: (1) **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera), actuation, and lower-level control (ROS2 nodes on Jetson Orin Nano), (2) **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection, reporting, and ACC control logic (cloud-based), (3) **User Entity**: Provides real-time visualization (3D rendering) and remote management (control panel) via Wi-Fi network, (4) **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity data serialization/unit conversion. The system uses ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication (UDP-based)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin spans two lifecycle phases:
  1. **Design/Development Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform to simulate ACC logic, validate ISO 15622 compliance, and prototype remote management features.
  2. **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, optimization, and health management of the ACC system during vehicle operation (e.g., fuel economy improvements, predictive maintenance insights)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs:
  - **Network Protocols**: ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication (e.g., between DT Entity and User Entity).
  - **Latency Requirements**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP V2V standard) for real-time operation.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Components synchronized to ≤100 ms accuracy (NTP-like mechanism implied) for event ordering and data integrity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted/deployed across two primary environments: (1) **On-Board Deployment**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer (Physical Twin Entity) for sensor fusion, actuation, and real-time control, (2) **Cloud Deployment**: Remote servers for computation offloading (ACC control logic), data storage (SQL databases), and report generation (Digital Twin Entity). The **User Entity** runs on a remote UI (e.g., web dashboard) for visualization and control panel access. Deployment follows a **modular ROS2 package** structure, with each FE instantiated as a separate node."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: Stores ego vehicle state data externally (e.g., cloud database) for analytics and compliance validation (e.g., ISO 15622).
  - **V2V Standards**: Adheres to 3GPP V2V communication requirements (≤100 ms latency) for inter-vehicle coordination (though not directly integrated with other vehicles)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards: (1) **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for digital twin entities (Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, Data Translation FE), (2) **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control standards for ACC control logic (performance class I), (3) **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication requirements (latency ≤100ms), (4) **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication, (5) **NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK**: Software development kit for Jetson Orin Nano deployment, (6) **ISO/IEC 30173**: Concepts and terminology (used for context but not directly implemented). Deviations from ISO 23247 include the **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin includes safety and security considerations:
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators retain control via remote management (e.g., emergency braking commands).
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency ensures safe operation (3GPP V2V standard).
  - **Safety-Critical Paths**: ACC logic is executed on cloud/remote hardware to offload resource-constrained ECUs, reducing risk of local failures.
  - **No explicit encryption/validation details**: Security mechanisms (e.g., TLS, ROS2 lifecycle validation) are not described in the provided text."
]
